content.text:
I'll start by warming up - reading the environment and getting oriented with the codebase.

```bash
cd "D:\Proton Drive\My files\Documents\Professional\Programming\Web Development\system.knowledgebase" && git fetch origin main && git merge origin/main --no-edit
```

```bash
git log -3 --oneline
```

```bash
ls tasks/
```

I've completed the warmup. The codebase is up to date with the latest commits showing recent design system work:

- `43fcaf2` - docs: create comprehensive design system documentation
- `04f3678` - refactor: eliminate ALL hardcoded Tailwind colors - zero tolerance
- `e0daf2e` - refactor: Phase 1 design system - add semantic color tokens

The tasks directory contains various planning documents including widget development guides and sprint plans. The codebase appears to be in good health with recent refactoring work on the design system.

I'm ready to assist. What would you like to work on?
